days.uk_summary: Rain sets in through afternoon widely.
days.region_headline: Drizzly tops at dawn, then persistent rain later.
days.wind_headline: Southwesterly 20 to 30mph, active buffeting on tops.
days.wind_effect: Strenuous walking conditions forming over high plateau.
days.precip_detail: Drizzly on the high tops at dawn, a few spots of light rain from the west, but several hours of largely dry conditions. Rain arrives from the west as midday approaches, spreading widely and setting in persistently through afternoon.
days.cloud_detail: Bases start 700-1000m, lowest western hills but also some early breaks (though high Cairngorm plateau likely stays shrouded). Cloud fills in from the west from midday onward, bases to 500-600m near and west of Strathspey with lower ragged patches.
days.sun_clarity: Very good visibility out of cloud; sunshine occasionally.

days.precip_detail: A largely dry day, though patches of light drizzle or mist may affect western summits early on.
days.cloud_detail: Low cloud banks clearing the summits by mid-morning to leave summits mostly clear.

days.wind_effect: Walking strenuous, balance affected on ridges.
days.precip_detail: Persistent, heavy rain arriving from the west in the afternoon, potentially torrential.
days.cloud_detail: Summits continuously shrouded in low cloud, bases lowering to 400m in rain.

outlook.outlook: Settled weather returning later in the week with high pressure building from the south, temperatures rising and winds easing.
